# Magento Shopping Cart Development — Custom Magento Solutions

> Custom Magento shopping cart and checkout development. Adobe Commerce specialists. By Dahlquist E-handelskonsulter AB.

This site covers custom Magento shopping cart development — from basic checkout customisation to complex B2B cart logic, PunchOut procurement checkout, and high-performance cart optimisation.

## About

Dahlquist E-handelskonsulter AB was founded in 2016 by Niklas Dahlquist. 150+ completed Magento projects. Certified Adobe Commerce partner. Deep experience with Hyva Theme, headless Magento and ERP-integrated checkout flows.

## Key Topics

- Custom Magento checkout steps and modifications
- B2B cart logic (company pricing, approval workflows, purchase order numbers)
- Multi-address checkout for B2B merchants
- Payment integration (Klarna, Stripe, Adyen, Svea, Nets)
- PunchOut checkout (cXML, OCI) for SAP Ariba, Coupa, Jaggaer
- Cart performance optimisation (quote collection queries, FPC, Redis)
- Hyva Theme cart and checkout implementation

## Technology

Magento 2.4.x, Adobe Commerce Cloud, PHP 8.x, GraphQL, Hyva Theme, Elasticsearch, Redis, Varnish

## Contact

For Magento cart and checkout development: https://dahlquist.se/magento
